text:
Footsteps of Doom is the 1st track on the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack 02, as well as the 1st track on disc 2 of the "Attack on Titan" The Final Season Original Soundtrack Complete Album. It was composed and arranged by Kohta Yamamoto. 

It was released on February 7, 2022, shortly following the premiere of Episode 80.

The track (as well as many other Attack on Titan soundtracks) uses choirs from the Requiem Professional Choir kit by 8DIO.

All occurrences

Episodes 80 and 81 - The Rumbling begins
Special 1 and Episode 88 - Ramzi and Halil witness the arrival of the Rumbling
Special 1 and Episode 89 - The Rumbling reaches Odiha
